name: @greenthumb/desktop
description: Electron desktop shell — runs the AdonisJS engine locally and loads the React UI. Local-first: all data stays on the machine.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,electron -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @greenthumb/api dev" "pnpm --filter @greenthumb/web dev" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.json && wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3333/health && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.prepackage: pnpm --filter @greenthumb/core build && pnpm --filter @greenthumb/web build && pnpm --filter @greenthumb/api build && pnpm run build:main
